files.data:
# Course illustrations

Six original illustrations covering algorithms, Ada Lovelace, early electronic computers, programming languages, networks, and computing responsibility.

All lesson images and the course cover are stored locally under `assets/images/` for offline compilation and reading. The lesson illustrations were created specifically for this sample repository and do not depend on remote image hosts.

Research and further-reading links remain in the lesson text.

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="1600" height="900" viewBox="0 0 1600 900">
  <rect width="1600" height="900" fill="#536f70"/>
  <path d="M0 680 C300 520 560 800 900 620 S1320 440 1600 600 V900 H0Z" fill="#f6f4ef" opacity=".16"/>
  <circle cx="1280" cy="200" r="138" fill="#f6f4ef" opacity=".24"/>
  <text x="110" y="325" fill="#f6f4ef" font-family="Georgia,serif" font-size="78">A Brief History of</text>
  <text x="110" y="420" fill="#f6f4ef" font-family="Georgia,serif" font-size="72">Computer Science</text>
  <text x="115" y="505" fill="#f6f4ef" font-family="Arial,sans-serif" font-size="30" opacity=".84">An MCF 1.0 course</text>
</svg>

id: ideas-before-machines
title: "Ideas Before Machines"
description: "A focused unit in A Brief History of Computer Science."
lessons:
  - lessons/01-algorithms-before-computers.mcf
  - lessons/02-ada-lovelace-and-general-purpose-ideas.mcf

id: machines-and-programs
title: "Machines and Programs"
description: "A focused unit in A Brief History of Computer Science."
lessons:
  - lessons/01-the-electronic-era.mcf
  - lessons/02-programming-languages.mcf

id: networks-and-society
title: "Networks and Society"
description: "A focused unit in A Brief History of Computer Science."
lessons:
  - lessons/01-networks-change-scale.mcf
  - lessons/02-computing-and-responsibility.mcf

mcf: "1.0"
id: history-of-computer-science
title: "A Brief History of Computer Science"
language: en
description: "From algorithms and early machines to networks, programming languages, and the questions computing raises today."
authors:
  - "Theoria Learning Studio"
license: CC-BY-4.0
version: "1.0.0"
cover: assets/images/cover.svg
chapters:
  - source: chapters/ideas-before-machines
  - source: chapters/machines-and-programs
  - source: chapters/networks-and-society
